response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or deep expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems. His leadership in technical discovery and mentorship is implied but not detailed.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, relevant to cloud and integration work.
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., Pinepoint Systems, Dunnhumby) and open-source tools (e.g., MCP code generators).
Demonstrated leadership in technical mentorship, workshops, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., Altom Consulting, Acme Software).
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years developing production-grade AI solutions or RAG/vector database expertise.
No mention of advanced AI/ML qualifications (e.g., Master's/PhD) or experience with multi-agent frameworks (e.g., LangGraph).
Primary focus appears to be full-stack/web development, with AI work framed as a secondary responsibility.
